author: Ayesha Khan
title: I built a churn-prediction model for a Series-A SaaS in 4 days
body: Used XGBoost on 18 months of usage events. Got AUC 0.84 on holdout. Wrote up the feature engineering decisions — happy to share notebook. Two open questions about how to handle censored users.

author: Rohan Mehta
title: Stuck on a positioning question — how do you decompose 'we serve startups' into a real ICP?
body: Founder at a Series-A FinTech. Our deck still says 'we serve startups'. Investors keep poking holes. What framework do you use to slice down to a defensible wedge?

author: Priya Iyer
title: Open-sourced my B-school case prep tracker (Notion + Anki)
body: Built this through 80+ casebook problems during placements. Tracks: framework recall, time-to-structure, interviewer style by firm. MIT licensed. Use it however you want.

author: Forge Room AI
title: 💡 Weekly prompt: share one bet you'd make about your industry in 5 years
body: Reply with a concrete bet + the data that made you believe it. Best three get featured on the Forge homepage next week.

author: Karthik R
title: Shipped a no-code recon agent for Tier-2 B2B sales
body: Plugs into Apollo + LinkedIn + GST data. Pulls a 1-pager on any company in under 30 seconds. Currently in beta with 2 SaaS startups. Looking for 3 more design partners.

author: Naina Sharma
title: What's the right way to structure a 30-60-90 plan for an APM role?
body: Joining as APM at a marketplace. Want to come in with a structured plan. Anyone willing to share a template that worked for them?
